subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! The Light is imprisoned in darkness, and the Speaker of Sinai is forbidden to speak, for the ears of the world are attuned to the tales [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسن نور در ظلمت مسجون مکلم طور از نطق ممنوع چه که آذان عالم باصغاء قصص
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @light and darkness
